title: packera neomexicana var. mutabilis
intro: Packera neomexicana var. mutabilis, also known as New Mexico ragwort or Western ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which contribute to its medicinal properties and offer potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Packera neomexicana var. mutabilis can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions for herbal use, with recommended dosages and preparations varying depending on the specific condition being addressed.
